aboutPage.title: About Me
aboutPage.seoTitle: About Fabien Chung — Full Stack & Mobile Developer
aboutPage.seoDescription: 20+ years of full-stack product development. Flutter, React, Node.js. Co-founder and CTO of 3 startups. Based in Montréal, available remotely.
aboutPage.subtitle: Solo Developer & Digital Craftsman

inspiration.title: The "Solo Leveling" Mindset
inspiration.content:
The name is a nod to the manga Solo Leveling. However, "Solo Developing" doesn't mean working alone; it’s a commitment to constant progression. Like an infinite "level up," I treat every project as an opportunity to master every facet of a product—from technical architecture to marketing and business strategy.

Success requires more than just code; it depends on understanding the market and collaborating effectively with internal teams. This holistic approach allows me to bridge communication gaps and maintain a high-level vision. I combine the efficiency of an autonomous builder with the collaborative spirit needed to bring our shared vision to life, friction-free.

profile.title: Who Am I?
profile.name: Fabien Chung
profile.bio:
With over 20 years of experience in the tech industry, my core expertise lies in mobile-first full-stack development. However, my journey extends beyond code. Through my professional experience, I have honed Product Ownership skills to better align technology with business needs, while integrating AI automations to maximize efficiency.

Currently, I am expanding my marketing knowledge to build the most complete skillset possible. My goal is to offer a holistic vision that bridges the gap between robust engineering and product growth.

recommendations.title: What Others Say
recommendations.subtitle: Trusted reviews from my linkedin profile

list.text: Fabien is one of the most dedicated professionals I have met, with an impressive ability to think outside the box. He is pragmatic and focused on user benefits—often challenging me when I come up with 'crazy ideas' to funnel them into practical implementation. I highly recommend Fabien to anyone looking for skilled programming leadership.
list.author: Eric S.

list.text: Fabien is an excellent Tech Lead. He designed and implemented efficient architectures while solving various business and technical issues. Most importantly, Fabien helped me personally tackle difficult challenges, from which I've learned a lot. He is a great collaborator, always available to offer support and guidance whenever needed.
list.author: Mykyta G.

list.text: Fabien's role is both strategic (architectural capacity) and tactical (senior developer). He is professional and focused when collaborating with our QA and Dev teams, ensuring best practices. He provides thought leadership to recommend technical solutions and is highly responsive. A true pleasure to work with.
list.author: Aysha V

list.text: Fabien accompanies me as an entrepreneurship mentor. He helps me see clearly through the blind spots of my business, structure my ideas, and prioritize the essentials during the startup phase. I am very grateful for his support and highly recommend him to anyone looking to develop their business in a strategic and coherent way.
list.author: Martine M.

founderProducts.subtitleDesktop: Products founded and developed independently. Click on a project to expand and discover its technical architecture.

zeloop.tagline: Eco-friendly social network rewarding green actions with cryptocurrency — deployed under 4 distinct brands.

whitelabel.title: White Label Architecture
whitelabel.description: A single Flutter codebase deployed under 4 visual identities — newBin, StopMego, Cherry and Eau de Paris. Dynamic theme system and per-client configuration.

api.title: Reward Engine API
api.description: Generic cryptocurrency reward REST API. 4 blockchains — Ethereum, EOS, Binance Smart Chain and VeChain. Smart contracts in Solidity & C++.

spotter.title: ZeLoop Spotter
spotter.description: Field application for waste collectors, integrated with the VeChain blockchain. Flutter web mini-app deployed without a store.

lovt.tagline: Service marketplace dedicated to young people — 2,000 registrations in 1 month thanks to a PWA strategy without going through the stores.

pwa.title: Flutter PWA Strategy
pwa.description: Deployment in a few weeks, zero store. After lazy loading optimization: 3× more registrations while reducing Firebase reads below the free tier threshold.

installer.title: pwa_installer
installer.description: Open source Dart library published on pub.dev. Natively triggers the PWA install banner from Flutter Web — a feature missing from the framework by default.

hiiba.tagline: First marketplace for item donations in the United Arab Emirates — connects donors and receivers in a local circular economy.

app.title: Flutter Marketplace App
app.description: Cross-platform iOS, Android and Web application. Ad management, localized matching, push notifications and integrated messaging system.

cogni.tagline: Companion app for the physical book "Les Aventures de Cogni" — generates an infinite number of interactive episodes with random puzzles.

engine.title: Generative Episode Engine
engine.description: Random episode and puzzle generation engine linked to the physical book. Each session offers a unique experience — the content never runs out.

barcode.tagline: Price tracker via barcode scan — detects shrinkflation in real time when a product shrinks without its price dropping.

scanner.title: Shrinkflation Scanner
scanner.description: Mobile app that tracks price history product by product and alerts when the weight decreases without a price drop — a mainstream, under-detected problem.

skills.subtitle: From iOS app to VeChain smart contract — shipped to production.

seo.title: Full Stack Developer Montréal | Fabien Chung
seo.description: Fabien Chung is a full stack developer based in Montreal, Canada with 20+ years of experience. He builds end-to-end platforms — mobile apps (Flutter, iOS, Android), web applications (React, Node.js), APIs and backend systems (Firebase, PostgreSQL). Available for freelance and contract work in Montreal and remotely.
